description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring large rectangular windows and a mix of white and gray exterior surfaces. The structure is single-story, with a prominent main entrance and a small porch area visible on one side. The building includes a garage section, and the layout suggests an open-plan interior with multiple rooms. There is a patch of green lawn adjacent to the house, indicating a landscaped yard or garden area. The windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns, providing ample natural light. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a white-gray exterior, featuring a garage and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front and side of the bungalow are visible, showing the main entrance, porch, and garage, with a green lawn to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the back of the bungalow, with fewer windows and a clearer view of the garage and yard.
description_view_2: Side elevation displays the elongated profile, window arrangements, and the full extent of the lawn and driveway.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizes the flat roof, overall footprint, and the relationship between the house and the green yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
